props.title: Critical Tables
props.description: Critical Success, Critical Failure, and Body Hit tables used in Suwanee Gamers sessions.

props.title: Critical Success
props.headers: Roll | Label | Description (Save DC = 8 + Attack Bonus)
props.rows:
1 - 6 | Normal | Normal critical damage
7 - 8 | Noteworthy | Normal critical damage + CON Save — On Fail: disadvantage on next attack; On Save: no additional effect
9 - 10 | Remarkable | Normal critical damage + DEX Save — On Fail: target knocked prone; On Save: no additional effect
11 - 12 | Substantial | Normal critical damage + Body hit, Minor
13 | Grave | Normal critical damage + CON Save — On Fail: target loses half remaining hit points (after crit. dmg.); On Save: no additional effect
14 | Prominent | Normal critical damage + DEX Save — On Fail: weapon/shield broken (if magical, auto save DC); On Save: weapon or shield dropped
15 | Grievous | Normal critical damage + CON Save — On Fail: target stunned until end of their next turn; On Save: no additional effect
16 | Savage | An overpowering blow extends beyond the target — ½ damage to another target in range (player's choice). If no additional target in range, double critical damage
17 | Scarring | Maximum critical damage
18 | Severe | Maximum critical damage + Body hit, Major
19 | Dire | Critical damage doubled + CON Save — On Fail: target unconscious until end of its next turn; On Save: no additional effect
20 | Deadly | CON Save at disadvantage — On Fail: drops to 0 hit points (½ remaining hit points for boss); On Save: double critical damage

props.title: Critical Failure
props.rows:
15 - 20 | Awkward | You fumble but steady yourself
10 - 14 | Embarrassing | Your fumble puts you off balance — you lose your reaction until the end of your next turn
5 - 9 | Humiliating | Your fumble causes you to fall prone
4 | Insufferable | Your fumble shows you are overwhelmed — you lose your movement until the end of your next turn
3 | Terrible | Your fumble causes you to backfire — you target/damage self, drop weapon/shield (DM's Discretion)
2 | Painful | Your fumble exposes you — one target may make an Attack of Opportunity against you
1 | Unspeakable | Your fumble causes you to hit an ally — you damage an ally (DM discretion)

props.eyebrow: Triggered on Substantial / Severe Critical Success
props.title: Body Hits
props.rows:
1 | Full Body | Minor: target knocked back 10' — Major: target knocked back 10' and prone
2 | Head | Minor: target stunned until end of its next turn — Major: target stunned 1d4 rounds
3 | Chest | Minor: target knocked prone — Major: target unconscious until end of its next turn
4 | Stomach | Minor: internal damage, target's next attack at disadvantage — Major: internal damage, 1d6 damage for 1d4 rounds
5L - 6R | Arm | Minor: injured, DM discretion or unusable until combat end — Major: DEX Save or severed (DM discretion on consequences)
7L - 8R | Leg | Minor: injured, DM discretion or move halved until combat end — Major: DEX Save or severed (DM discretion on consequences)
9L - 10R | Hand | Minor: injured, DM discretion or unusable until combat end — Major: DEX Save or severed (DM discretion on consequences)
11L - 12R | Foot | Minor: injured, DM discretion or move halved until combat end — Major: DEX Save or severed (DM discretion on consequences)
